/usr/bin/ar qc libenet_static.a CMakeFiles/enet_static.dir/vendor/enet/callbacks.c.o CMakeFiles/enet_static.dir/vendor/enet/compress.c.o CMakeFiles/enet_static.dir/vendor/enet/host.c.o CMakeFiles/enet_static.dir/vendor/enet/list.c.o CMakeFiles/enet_static.dir/vendor/enet/packet.c.o CMakeFiles/enet_static.dir/vendor/enet/peer.c.o CMakeFiles/enet_static.dir/vendor/enet/protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/enet_static.dir/vendor/enet/unix.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libenet_static.a
